title: Warble — Offline-First Voice Transcription (Web App + PWA)
summary: A dark, minimal voice-transcription app that keeps the big circular mic and chat-style transcript feel of the reference speech-react codebase (slate-950 canvas, indigo-600 primary, green-500 listening, yellow connecting, red stop) and elevates it into a full product with an offline-first identity. The defining differentiator from littlebird.ai is that recording is never blocked: even with no connection the indigo mic stays prominent and enabled, audio is stored locally, and it transcribes automatically when the network returns. The plan is mobile-first (the PWA installs on phones) with a desktop two-pane layout to show responsiveness. Recorder states are laid out as a left-to-right progression per section (online idle → online listening, and offline idle → offline recording) so reviewers read them as a flow. Status is signalled consistently: green Online / amber Offline badges, and status pills Pending (amber) / Transcribing (indigo, animated) / Done (green) / Error (red). The Recordings section pairs the online view — including the 'You're back online — N recordings ready to transcribe' CTA banner and a Transcribe-all action — against the offline view where Transcribe is disabled with a 'Connect to transcribe' hint while playback and copy/delete stay live. Recommended variations are the states that best represent the product's core promise (offline idle for the recorder, and the online back-online view for history), since the offline-first behaviour is the whole point. Sample transcripts are real, believable English/Hindi/Telugu content. All icons are inline SVG (mic, stop, wifi/wifi-off, play, copy, trash, download/install) in the reference's lucide-style stroke set. Dark-only, matching the reference product; no light theme.

sections.title: Recorder — Online
sections.description: The main recorder connected to the network: idle prompt then live listening with waveform and streaming transcript.

sections.title: Recorder — Offline (differentiator)
sections.description: Same recorder with no connection: the mic stays enabled and prominent, audio saves locally and transcribes when back online.

sections.title: Recordings / History
sections.description: The saved-recordings list with status pills, playback, transcript previews, plus the online back-online CTA vs the offline disabled-transcribe state.

sections.title: Recording Detail
sections.description: A single recording expanded: audio player with scrubber, full transcript, and copy / re-transcribe / download / delete.

sections.title: PWA Install
sections.description: The install affordance: an inline install banner over the recorder and a full 'Add to Home Screen' prompt sheet noting offline support.

sections.title: Desktop Layout
sections.description: Responsive desktop two-pane workspace: sidebar recordings list with an install affordance and a large centered recorder.
